case_title: BOWEN DWELLE et al VS. MICHAEL C HALL et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
STATUS CONFERENCE OF JUN-21-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DWELLE, BOWEN AN INDIVIDUAL HARVEY, JAMES TED AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, MICHAEL C AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-21-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-23-2002
